articles.title: Japan, South Korea stocks hit more records, as oil gains on Iran war ending fragility - AP News
articles.description: Oil prices have gained more than 3%, and stock markets in Japan and South Korea have hit fresh record highs on enthusiasm over the artificial intelligence boom. World shares have mostly advanced, despite growing tensions between the U.S. and Iran and as inves…

articles.title: SoftBank overtakes Toyota after more than 20 years to become Japan’s largest company - Financial Times
articles.description: Demand for AI stocks powers tech giant’s shares as it takes top spot by market capitalisation

articles.title: NVIDIA, Foxconn and Taiwan Medical Centers Bring Agentic and Physical AI to ‘Healthy Taiwan’ - NVIDIA Newsroom
articles.description: NVIDIA today announced that Foxconn and Taiwan’s leading medical centers are deploying NVIDIA-powered special agent workforces to scale the region’s transition to AI‑driven health systems.

articles.title: NVIDIA Announces NVIDIA Isaac GR00T Reference Humanoid Robot for Academic Research - NVIDIA Newsroom
articles.description: NVIDIA today announced the NVIDIA Isaac™ GR00T Reference Humanoid Robot, the first open humanoid robot reference design built on NVIDIA Jetson Thor™ and the NVIDIA Isaac GR00T open development platform.

articles.title: NVIDIA Launches Cosmos 3, the Open Frontier Foundation Model for Physical AI - NVIDIA Newsroom
articles.description: NVIDIA today launched NVIDIA Cosmos™ 3, an open world foundation model for physical AI built on a breakthrough mixture-of-transformers architecture that combines vision reasoning, world generation and action prediction in a single system.

articles.title: Trump is facing a new inflation warning from the bond market, adding to his midterm challenges - AP News
articles.description: The world is getting more uptight about lending money to President Donald Trump’s government. The energy price spike triggered by the Iran war has seeped into the price of bonds that help fund the U.S. government. That's caused interest rates to climb in ways…

articles.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Ramps Into Full Production to Power Agentic AI Factories Worldwide - NVIDIA Newsroom
articles.description: NVIDIA today announced the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform is ramping into full production to power agentic AI factories worldwide.

articles.title: Oil prices climb over 3% as U.S.-Iran talks at impasse, Israel expands Lebanon offensive - CNBC
articles.description: Oil prices rose on Monday after Israel instructed troops to push deeper into Lebanon amid renewed clashes with the Iran-backed Hezbollah group.

articles.title: Berkshire Hathaway to Buy Taylor Morrison for $6.8 Billion - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. will acquire Taylor Morrison Home Corp. in an all-cash deal worth about $6.8 billion, the first major purchase under chief executive Greg Abel and a vote of confidence in the US housing market.
